description:
Fix Icon Visibility Issue for Success and Info States

Resolve the contrast problem where success and info icons appear invisible due to white icons being displayed on white backgrounds.

Requirements:
- Identify all success and info icon components with the visibility issue
- Update icon colors to ensure sufficient contrast against white backgrounds (use appropriate brand colors: green for success, blue for info)
- Alternatively, if icons should remain white, change the background color to provide contrast
- Verify the fix works across all instances where these icons appear (notifications, alerts, toasts, status indicators, etc.)
- Ensure the solution follows accessibility guidelines (WCAG AA minimum contrast ratio of 4.5:1)
- Test in both light and dark modes if applicable
- Maintain visual consistency with the overall design system
